feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: TESM and LRDTSA Calculation Methods in Intelligent Forecast
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a case I try on SAP B1 Hana to test Intelligent Forecast and done following steps:

1- First add sales order from 1/1/2024 to 12/8/2024 by following Quantity as steps (11-12-14-15-18-24-26-28-30) and added in start date 1/9/2024 End Date 31/12/2024, and set monthly on view and set item in Item No. that added transaction in sales order , then choose intelligent forecast 

2- choose Maximum History time buckets 30 and then add forecast the LRDSTA calc method show as standard, despite I choose standard calc Method 

I have 2 question :

1-why appear  LRDSTA calc method show as standard, despite I choose standard calc Method 

2- How TESM and LRDTSA working when i choose Maximum History time Buckets by months cause when i choose TESM the table forecast as months from September to December is deferent

Could you please tell me how the equation works, and why the results is calculate deferent when i fixed all data and run forecast again?

and how TESM and LRDTSA working when change alpha &beta& gama

    

when I choose Alpha beta and Gama or is set to 0.001 the total quantity change as capture

entry.title: Upload .XML file to CPI endpoint
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a scenario that want to upload XML file to CPI Endpoint. Is it possible or not? If it is possible please suggest

entry.title: Cold Store connection name change while importing the ADSO in BW4HANA
entry.content:
In the ADSO Data Tiering properties, we can enable the hot, warm and cold tiers. While selecting the cold tier, system asks for the Cold Store connection name. We have set the connection name in DEV as SAPIQDEV but the cold store connection name is different in QA environment which is SAPIQQA but while importing the ADSO from DEV to QA, the transport is failing with the message that the connection with the name SAPIQDEV does not exist. 

Is there a way where the connection name is changed automatically while importing the ADSO i.e., from SAPIQDEV to SAPIQQA?

Thanks

entry.title: Install S4HANA 2023 - Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I has issue when installed S4HANA 2023 and HANA Database in one host.

Kindly please your advice.

Detail issue on below, and please find the attachment.

An error occurred while processing option SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up). You can now:

Choose Retry
to repeat the current step.
Choose Log Files
to get more information about the error.
Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

R3trans -d
This is R3trans version 6.27 (release 793 - 12.06.24 - 09:07:06).
unicode enabled version
R3trans finished (0000).

entry.title: How to add a SAP managed tag?
entry.content:
Hi colleagues,

we're planning to add blog posts for our product, however, it's not available as a SAP managed tag.

The following tags would be great to have and are missing:

  • The product itself: SAP S/4HANA Cloud for credit integration 
  • The add-on it integrates with: SAP Credit Management
    (this is part of SAP S/4HANA, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and SAP ERP)

Could you add these to the SAP managed tags?

Best wishes
Christina

entry.title: How to Edit/Amend SAP distribution list - SO23
entry.content:
Process notes on how to Amend /Edit distribution list in SAP

 

Go to Tcode - SO23

 

 

Select from the Ty. (Shared or Private) and put the name of the Distribution list in Name field.

 

Once done, click on Find button and it will show the list which is in Shared and in Name space as below.

 

 

 

Double click on the Share Distribution – Name Space and it will open the list as below, go to Edit mode and update the email address / delete if not needed.

 

Put in the email address and press enter, it will automatically consider the Type (By E-Mail)

 

Hope the above scenario and example with screen shots were helpful. Happy Learning.

entry.title: How to count non-unique names from a list in SAP Story
entry.content:
How to create a calculated column in a database which returns "Unique" if user ID appears once & "Not Unique" if it appears more than once?

I have a database with a list of user IDs. Here, a user ID may be unique or may be repeated. Is there a way I can add a calculated column to my query which returns "Unique" for those user IDs that appear once in the database and "Not Unique" for those user IDs that appear two or more times?

entry.title: Client System Login Isuue
entry.content:
Dear Sir,
Team at today morning we have facing an issue with my 70% client system when i login SAP in client system it is showing Zero (0) error or Connection to the database server loss i also attached error file please look this & resolved soon.

entry.title: Export to excel IM32 and IM52
entry.content:
Is there a way to extract the data from report IM32 and IM52 to excel?

Also, is there a report in SAP that shows changes made in IM32?

entry.title: Pick value from segments based on qualifier in AIF
entry.content:
Hello,
I have to update index table for AIF.
In my case I have multiple(4 records) values in same segments and it is updating index table with 1st segment only. But I want to pick value for 3rd record (0080293).

I have implemented a note 3416275 and maintained it as below.

Here, I want to update index table with sales organization for qualifier '008' which is at 3rd place.
Could you please guide and help here.
Thanks in advance !

entry.title: Unable to restrict UD before Quality characteristics completion
entry.content:
While completing UD without completing Quality characteristics system will not show error. How to activate that. If that is possible in Standard or we need to do any customization. This issue is with 03 (In process inspection) Inspection type.
 
Any one kindly guide me on this

entry.title: Can someone please provide step by step process of archiving business partner in S4HANA cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,


Can someone please explains the process of archiving the business partner in cloud?

Also, please explain EOP, residence and retention periods.

Thanks,

Rushi

entry.title: SLI
entry.content: Can anyone please tell me how to generate COO and SLI in preference? (inSAP GTS)

entry.title: Getting Cannot get/ error after deploying SAP BTP project.
entry.content:
Hii everyone , 
i am writing this post becuase i am getting a unexpected error on my project after deployment on cloud foundry

 this is my ui after doing  cds watch profile but when i deploy this on cloud foundry i am getting  and error 

https://d6477c92trial-dev-hanaapp-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/

Cannot GET /

 

but when i want inner data it provide me 
https://d6477c92trial-dev-hanaapp-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/odata/v4/its-customer/customer

 

when i seach the issue i get this >-----{The root URL ("/") might not be defined in your service.}

so how i can solve this issue and what file i need to upload here so All You can help me to  resolve this issue.

entry.title: Problem availability control for internal order
entry.content:
I have a problem referred to the availability control for internal order when post a service entry sheet with posting date different by delivery date of PO. This is my set in customizing for Budget Profile.

My problem is:

1) I create a PO with delivery date 31.12.2023 and in this way availability control is correct

2) I create a SES in 2024 for example posting date 31.03.2024. In this moment my budget is finished for 2024, but the system allow me to post the SES and the assigned value of budget begin negative without block the post.

This is the result in report:

How can I solve this problem? I think that the system blocks the posting if on Internal Order there isn't budget for the next year.

Best regards.

Alessandro

entry.title: CDS Views for Price Simulation of Customer/Material Combination in sales SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi team,

As per the requirement by Business,I wanted to create a report for a pricing simulation of sales order where price is maintained on Customer/Material Combination with Discount and Tax value.Please suggest a solution where I can fetch data in the form of report.

Also,kindly suggest a CDS View if available as its a priority kindly help 

Regards 

Dhanush

entry.title: Back Date Forecast not considered in MRP Run in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While running MRP in SAP business one system does not consider current month or current week forecast because system considers forecast at the first day of the period (month or week), So that the first day is passed and now we are in between the period (month or week), the system skips that forecast. How to fix it so that system start considering forecast of that period.

Thanking you ahead of time.

entry.title: Program name to use MF47 in background
entry.content: I need to save the errors in MF47 in background processing , which programe name can i use it in SM36 .

entry.title: cloud foundry deployment failed
entry.content: Getting this error after i perform cf deploy mta_archive command,

entry.title: Will firewall affects while connecting to database table via SAP CPI ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am doing integration of databases from two different servers via Sap CPI , Will firewall affects SAP CPI to fetch database tables  while connecting to database table to fetch tables data from bussiness layer and send it to another database server. will sap cpi blocks data to fetch it from database due to firewall .
